heading: Preference within groups
label: 13615 Preference within groups
text: Among disabled families qualifying for occupancy in units reserved under , and among elderly families and near-elderly families qualifying for preference for occupancy pursuant to section 13611 or 13613 of this title, preference for occupancy in units that are assisted under shall be given to disabled families according to any preferences established under any system established under by the public housing agency.section 13612 of this titlesection 1437f of this titlesection 1437f(d)(1)(A) of this title
notes: Amendments1998— substituted “shall be given to disabled families according to any preferences established under any system established under by the public housing agency.” for “shall be given to disabled families according to the preferences for occupancy referred to in and the first sentence of section 1437f()(3)(B) of this title, to elderly families according to such preferences, and to near-elderly families according to such preferences, respectively.”Pub. L. 105–276section 1437f(d)(1)(A) of this titlesection 1437f(d)(1)(A)(i) of this titleo1996—, (f), temporarily substituted “any preferences” for “the preferences for occupancy referred to in and the first sentence of section 1437f()(3)(B) of this title, to elderly families according to such preferences, and to near-elderly families according to such preferences, respectively”.
